title: First release
notes: Keyboard-first PDF viewer with a command palette (Ctrl+Shift+P) that reaches every action
Page tools: swap, delete, rotate, move, insert, extract, and merge a whole folder into one PDF
Edit mode: add and style text fields and image overlays, then export them into the document
Search both page text and form fields, with highlighting
Zoom with sharp rendering, a live zoom percentage, and remembered per-document defaults
Print documents and rebind any keyboard shortcut to your liking
A What's New screen so you can catch up on changes any time
Every page operation writes a timestamped backup first, so your original is safe
